title: Fill LinkedIn profile fields to match the scenario's expected values
task: Open https://www.linkedin.com/in/me/ in the browser (you are already signed in) and edit the profile so it matches the values described in the scenario file benchmarks/browser/linkedin_profile.scenario.local.json. Edit only the fields that scenario lists, then reply with a one-line summary of the changes.
notes: Wraps the pre-existing Python+Playwright validator (benchmarks/browser/) as a bench scenario. Defaults to a human-driven app run: automating a personal LinkedIn account is checkpoint- and ToS-sensitive.
